$if(title)$
\title[$if(short-title)$$short-title$$else$$title$$endif$]{$title$$if(thanks)$\daggerfootnote{\texttt{$thanks$}}$endif$}
$endif$

$if(subtitle)$
$if(beamer)$
$else$
\usepackage{etoolbox}
\makeatletter
\providecommand{\subtitle}[1]{% add subtitle to \maketitle
  \apptocmd{\@title}{\par {\large #1 \par}}{}{}
}
\makeatother
$endif$
\subtitle{$subtitle$}
$endif$

% ---- Authors (supports multiple affiliations + ORCID) ----
$if(by-author)$
\author[$if(short-author)$$short-author$$endif$]{%
  $for(by-author)$%
    {\large $it.name.literal$%
      $if(it.orcid)$\textsuperscript{\normalsize\orcidlink{$it.orcid$}}$endif$%
      $if(it.affiliations)$%
        \textsuperscript{%
          $for(it.affiliations)$\inst{$it.number$}$sep$,$endfor$%
        }%
      $endif$%
    }%
    $sep$ \and %
  $endfor$%
}
$endif$

% ---- Institutions (deduped list with numbers) ----
$if(affiliations)$
\institute[]{%
  $for(affiliations)$%
    \inst{$it.number$} $it.name$%
    $if(it.department)$\\$it.department$$endif$\smallskip% 
    $if(it.city)$, $it.city$$endif$%
    $if(it.state)$, $it.state$$endif$%
    $sep$\\
  $endfor$%
}
$endif$

$if(titlegraphic)$
\titlegraphic{\includegraphics{$titlegraphic$}}
$endif$
$if(logo)$
\logo{\includegraphics{$logo$}}
$endif$

\definecolor{quarto-callout-note-color}{RGB}{0,114,178}
\definecolor{quarto-callout-note-color-frame}{RGB}{0,114,178}
\definecolor{quarto-callout-warning-color}{RGB}{213,94,0}
\definecolor{quarto-callout-warning-color-frame}{RGB}{213,94,0}
